headline: These Are April's 2 Hottest AI Stocks. Should You Buy Them in May?
summary: These AI winners surged in April, but upcoming earnings will decide if their rally has more room to run.

headline: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Scores High Growth Momentum Setup with Strong Technical and Fundamental Ratings
summary: Arista Networks (ANET) scores a 6/10 on High Growth Momentum with strong earnings and sales acceleration, plus a perfect 10/10 Technical Rating. Currently forming a bull flag pattern near its 52-week high, it offers a potential breakout entry at $179.81.
